ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or continent to which the country belongs */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country for the latest available year */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wellbeing_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country being assessed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "life_ladder" REAL /* Life Ladder score representing life satisfaction */,
  "log_gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Log of GDP per capita */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score */,
  "health_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy at birth */,
  "freedom_to_make_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption score */,
  "positive_affect" REAL /* Positive affect score */,
  "negative_affect" REAL /* Negative affect score */,
  "confidence_in_government" REAL /* Confidence in national government score */,
  "democratic_quality" REAL /* Democratic quality score */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Measure of income inequality */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is employed */,
  "education_index" REAL /* Index of educational attainment */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is unemployed */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Rate of inflation */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in poverty */,
  "internet_usage_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population with internet access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wellbeing_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well-being indicator being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the indicator */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access (e.g., city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES wellbeing_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "democratic_quality" (
  "democracy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the democratic quality record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country being assessed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the assessment */,
  "democratic_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of democracy */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the democratic quality assessment */,
  "electoral_process" REAL /* Score for the fairness and transparency of electoral processes */,
  "civil_liberties" REAL /* Score for the protection of civil liberties */,
  "functioning_of_government" REAL /* Score for the effectiveness and efficiency of government */,
  "political_participation" REAL /* Score for the level of political participation */,
  "political_culture" REAL /* Score for the political culture and norms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("democracy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_democratic_quality_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
